SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER JONES & BRIAN MARIANO, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE RICHARD KAUFMAN, PRESIDENT OF MANAGING MEMBER. STACY WEST, SOMER DEFRATES & KEVIN WASNIEWSKI, WITNESSES FOR DEFENDANT, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, JENNIFER MARIANO, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
